purpose: Periodically scan existing Auto-Suite modules and plans to identify refactoring opportunities that reduce duplication, improve architecture, and keep the codebase aligned with evolving standards.

execution_order.when_to_trigger: On-demand or after a batch of features has been implemented and reviewed, to keep technical debt under control.
required_input: Recent autosuite_code_review payloads across multiple suggestions.
High-level module map and dependency relationships, if available.

core_functions: Spot repeated patterns that should be moved into shared utilities or core modules.
Identify modules drifting away from agreed architectural patterns.
Recommend specific refactorings and module boundary adjustments.
Propose incremental, safe refactor plans rather than big-bang rewrites.
